steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student explicitly wants to provide an EXAMPLE of a dinosaur fossil's nickname. This means naming a specific nickname, not discussing nicknames in general.

steps.title: Find the choice that names a specific nickname
steps.content: D provides it by naming “Pops” as the specific example. A and C only discuss nicknames without naming one, while B describes the specimen without mentioning its nickname. That matches choice D — D is correct.
